title: Harshnath Temple
tagline: Harshnath Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Harshnath Temple (Sanskrit: हर्षनाथ् Harṣanātha) is a 10th-century Hindu temple, dedicated to Shiva, located on a prominent mountaintop in Sikar district of the Indian state of Raj
overview.description: Harshnath Temple (Sanskrit: हर्षनाथ् Harṣanātha) is a 10th-century Hindu temple, dedicated to Shiva, located on a prominent mountaintop in Sikar district of the Indian state of Rajasthan. It is located 14 km from the district headquarters at Sikar.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Harsh, Sikar
topPlaces.description: Harsh is a village in Sikar tehsil in Sikar district in Rajasthan, India. It is a place of religious importance.

topPlaces.name: Puran Badi
topPlaces.description: Puran Badi is a village in the Dhod Panchayat Samitii in the Sikar District of Rajasthan region in India. It is 12 kilometers southwest of Sikar.

topPlaces.name: Neemera
topPlaces.description: Neemera is a village in Sikar district of Rajasthan, India. It is 27 km from Sikar town in south.

topPlaces.name: Jeenmata
topPlaces.description: Jeen Mata is a village located in the Sikar district of Rajasthan, India. It is famous for the ancient and revered Jeen Mata Temple, which is dedicated to the goddess Jeen Mata (Jayanti Mata), believed to be a form of the Shakti deity.

topPlaces.name: Sanwali
topPlaces.description: Sanwali is a small town in Gram Panchayet Chandpura located in Sikar district of Rajasthan, India, 3 km from Sikar. The native language of Sanwali, spoken by most inhabitants, is Hindi.

topPlaces.name: Chandpura, Sikar
topPlaces.description: Chandpura is a village located in Sikar district of Rajasthan. It is 3 km away from Sikar.

topPlaces.name: Moondwara
topPlaces.description: Moondwara is a village in Sikar tehsil, Sikar district in Rajasthan, India. It is situated at a distance of 18 kilometres from Sikar in the south-west direction on Sikar-Naguor-Jodhpur road.

topPlaces.name: Gokulpura
topPlaces.description: Gokulpura is a village in Sikar Tehsil of Sikar district, in the Indian state of Rajasthan, 8.2 km from the district Sikar and 110 km from Jaipur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Harshnath Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Harshnath Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Harshnath Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Harshnath Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Harshnath Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Harshnath Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Harshnath Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Harshnath Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Harsh, Sikar, Puran Badi, Neemera, Jeenmata, Sanwali.
